blockers.mitigation: Configure release signing on all three platforms: Android signingConfigs + keystore (env-driven passwords); iOS ExportOptions.plist + provisioning profile + distribution cert; HarmonyOS signingConfigs in build-profile.json5 with .p12/.p7b material via DevEco Studio. Verification: release build installs on a real device for each platform.
blockers.reason: Audit 2026-06-27: 包体签名和分发 NOT ready on any platform. Android app/build.gradle.kts release build has no signingConfig, no signingConfigs block, no keystore reference. iOS ReaderForIOS.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj has only CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY='iPhone Developer' (Debug); no PROVISIONING_PROFILE_SPECIFIER, no ExportOptions.plist, no .entitlements, no .xcconfig. HarmonyOS build-profile.json5 has signingConfigs:[] empty with a dangling signingConfig:'default' reference; no .p12/.p7b/.cer key material in repo.

blockers.mitigation: Android: declare ForegroundService + wire startForeground. iOS: BGTaskScheduler + UNUserNotificationCenter authorization. HarmonyOS: real @ohos.notificationManager + @ohos.backgroundTaskManager APIs replacing smoke checksum. Verification: foreground/background download + visible notification on each platform.
blockers.reason: Audit 2026-06-27: 后台任务和通知 NOT functional on any platform. Android PARTIAL — AndroidNotificationRuntimeAdapter.kt creates NotificationChannel (downloads / playback / sync / maintenance) + NotificationCompat.Builder + runtime permission check, but NO <service> in AndroidManifest.xml, no startForeground() call, no foregroundServiceType (ForegroundService missing). iOS NONE — no BGTaskScheduler / UNUserNotificationCenter / registerForRemoteNotifications. HarmonyOS NONE — only a checksum placeholder in HarmonyOSHostSmokeRunner.ets; no @ohos.notificationManager / @ohos.backgroundTaskManager imports.

blockers.mitigation: Implement WebView login flow on all three: dedicated login WebView that loads bookSource.loginUrl, intercepts redirect / auth, harvests cookies into the shared cookie store. Android LoginActivity + WebView; iOS flip supportsLoginFlow:true + LoginView; HarmonyOS LoginPage.ets + onLoadIntercept. Verification: complete a real book-source web login and reuse cookies on a subsequent http.execute.
blockers.reason: Audit 2026-06-27: 登录 WebView 交互 NOT implemented on any platform. Android — no LoginActivity / LoginScreen / LoginViewModel; loginUrl field exists in DomainModels.kt but no WebView login UI. iOS — ProductionWebViewAdapter.capabilities() explicitly declares supportsLoginFlow:false; no login view. HarmonyOS PARTIAL — ArkWebPlatformAdapter has WebView + runJavaScript + cookie mirror, but no onLoadIntercept / onUrlLoadIntercept login flow, no LoginPage.ets; host_login_ui_authorization_audit only checks sessionPersistence.

blockers.mitigation: Audit 2026-06-27 found entry/src/main/cpp/types/libreader_core_napi/Index.d.ts only declares 3 exports (abiVersion / pingSmoke / sendJsonCommand) while reader_napi.cpp exports 12 (abiVersion / createRuntime / releaseRuntime / sendCommand / cancelRequest / readEvent / pendingEventCount / completeHostRequest / failHostRequest / pingSmoke / hostSmoke / lifecycleSmoke). sendJsonCommand is a stale POC residual not present in C++. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-27-harmonyos-rust-core-integration-s6.md Task 1 rewrites Index.d.ts to declare all 12 exports aligned with bindings/harmony/sdk/reader_core.ts NativeReaderCoreModule type. Blocks: any ArkTS code referencing completeHostRequest/failHostRequest/readEvent/pendingEventCount/hostSmoke/lifecycleSmoke will not compile or runtime-link against libreader_core_napi.so. Verification: hvigorw assembleHap + ReaderCoreNapiBridge.ets runHostSmokeClosedLoop() green on simulator.
blockers.reason: HarmonyOS NAPI Index.d.ts severely stale (3/12 exports declared, includes non-existent sendJsonCommand); breaks NAPI smoke closed-loop validation and any host.request round-trip from ArkTS

blockers.mitigation: Audit 2026-06-27 found no ArkTS host-adapter module exists in entry/src/main/ets/. Android has bindings/android/host-adapter/src/main/java/com/reader/core/host/ (HostAdapter.java + HostTransport + HostReply + HostReplyCodec + CapabilityHandler) but HarmonyOS has no equivalent. BridgeHTTPClient.ets implements 'Strategy B: localhost:8899 dev bridge' which bypasses Core host.request protocol entirely and violates Core/Host boundary. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-27-harmonyos-rust-core-integration-s6.md Task 3 creates entry/src/main/ets/hostadapter/ module (10 files: HostTransport / HttpRequest / HttpResponse / HostReply / HostReplyCodec / CapabilityHandler / HostAdapter / HostBus / HttpExecuteHandler / HostRuntime) mirroring Android host-adapter. Task 4 writes OHOSHTTPHostTransport using @ohos.net.http. Blocks: any real host.request round-trip (HTTP transport, persistence, system TTS) cannot route from Core to Host capabilities. Verification: host.request('http.execute', ...) returns host.complete with real 2xx body on simulator.
blockers.reason: HarmonyOS missing ArkTS host-adapter module; Core host.request events cannot be dispatched to platform-owned capabilities (HTTP / persistence / TTS). Current BridgeHTTPClient bypasses Core protocol entirely.

blockers.mitigation: Audit 2026-06-27 found all 5 ArkTS pages (Index.ets Tab container + BookshelfPage / SearchPage / ReaderPage / SettingsPage) routed through fixture-based services. HomeDashboardService uses MockBookshelfRepository(true) + FixtureReplayInterceptor + 3 fixture:// sources. SearchService uses BridgeClientWithFallback(BridgeHTTPClient, FixtureReplayInterceptor). ReaderPage uses FixtureEPUBParserAdapter + buildStoredEPUBFixture() with hardcoded content '在中国，任何超脱飞扬的思想...'. SettingsPage has no 'import source' entry. None of the 5 pages call ReaderCoreRuntime.send/request. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-27-harmonyos-rust-core-integration-s6.md Task 5 creates ReaderCoreClient App singleton + BookApi/SourceApi facade, Task 6 retires fixture services (strangler pattern: deprecate not delete), Task 7 modifies 5 pages' ViewModel layer to consume RustCore*Service. Blocks: HarmonyOS cannot pass Legado source search→detail→toc→content vertical via Rust Core. Verification: RustCoreEndToEndTest asserts non-fixture path + real Legado source pipeline green on simulator.
blockers.reason: HarmonyOS 5-page UI business path completely not connected to Rust Core; all pages route through MockBookshelfRepository / FixtureReplayInterceptor / BridgeClientWithFallback / FixtureEPUBParserAdapter. Legado search→detail→toc→content cannot run via Rust Core.

blockers.mitigation: Implement HarmonyOS theme system: ArkUI theme tokens (colors / typography / spacing) + dark/light mode switching + custom font registration (@ohos.font), mirroring Android ReaderTheme / iOS ReaderTheme. Verification: theme switch reflects on all 5 pages on simulator.
blockers.reason: Audit 2026-06-27: 主题和字体 implemented on Android (app/src/main/kotlin/com/reader/ui/theme/ReaderTheme.kt — MaterialTheme dark/light) and iOS (iOS/Modules/Theme/ReaderTheme.swift + ReaderColors.swift + ReaderTypography.swift). HarmonyOS NOT implemented — all 5 pages (Index.ets / BookshelfPage.ets / ReaderPage.ets / SettingsPage.ets / SearchPage.ets) use hardcoded colors (#1A1A1A / #007AFF / #F5F5F5) and fontSize() literals; no theme system, no @ohos.font registration, no dark/light switch. storage.write('setting.theme','light') is a string only with no ArkUI binding.

blockers.mitigation: Add Android SAF launcher: ActivityResultContracts.OpenDocument in ImportBook ViewModel/Screen feeding content:// Uri into existing AndroidContentUriLocalBookAdapter. Verification: pick .epub/.txt from system file picker and import book on emulator.
blockers.reason: Audit 2026-06-27: 文件选择和沙箱授权 implemented on iOS (iOS/Features/FileImporter/FileImportView.swift .fileImporter + security-scoped resource handoff) and HarmonyOS (entry/src/main/ets/platform/FilePickerAdapter.ets @kit.CoreFileKit DocumentViewPicker + permission handoff token). Android PARTIAL — AndroidContentUriLocalBookAdapter implements ContentResolver.takePersistableUriPermission() + openInputStream() (sandbox authorization ready) but NO SAF launcher (no ACTION_OPEN_DOCUMENT / ActivityResultContracts.OpenDocument), so the user has no file-pick entry point.

blockers.mitigation: Implement Android TextToSpeech: concrete AndroidTtsAdapter wrapping android.speech.tts.TextToSpeech (init / speak / stop / shutdown + UtteranceProgressListener), replacing FakeAndroidTtsAdapter. Verification: ReaderPage TTS plays zh-CN speech on emulator.
blockers.reason: Audit 2026-06-27: 系统 TTS 发声 implemented on iOS (iOS/Features/Reader/ReaderTTSPlayer.swift AVSpeechSynthesizer + delegate + rate control + zh-CN voice) and HarmonyOS (entry/src/main/ets/platform/SystemTtsAdapter.ets @kit.CoreSpeechKit textToSpeech.createEngine + SpeakListener + state machine). Android NOT implemented — only TtsEngine interface + FakeTtsEngine / FakeAndroidTtsAdapter stubs exist; no class instantiates android.speech.tts.TextToSpeech. Violates AGENTS.md TTS 策略 (发声归 Host 系统级 TTS).

blockers.mitigation: Split CSS/shorthand rules on &&/||/%% operators before feeding to scraper::Selector::parse (mirror evaluate_json_path_expression split logic). Legado AnalyzeRule.splitSourceRule does cross-type splitting.
blockers.reason: Core only splits &&/||/%% in evaluate_json_path_expression (JSONPath layer). CSS/shorthand path feeds combined selectors (e.g. class.ser-ret@li||class.j_bookList@li) directly to scraper::Selector::parse which fails. Affects search/detail/toc for sources using MultiRule operators on CSS rules.
